title: thelypteris atrorubens
intro: Thelypteris atrorubens, also known as the Red-veined Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas and the Caribbean. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Thelypteris atrorubens include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be administered to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
